Super Bear Adventure Version History & Changelogs (All Updates)

Complete version history for Super Bear Adventure from early releases to v12.1.5. Every update, new feature, bug fix, and content addition documented.

June 13, 2026 Updated Jun 17, 2026 8 min read
Share:

Complete Version History of Super Bear Adventure

Super Bear Adventure has evolved significantly since its initial release, growing from a modest 3D platformer into a feature-rich adventure game beloved by millions. This page documents every major version update, including new features, bug fixes, content additions, and quality-of-life improvements.

Understanding the game’s version history helps you appreciate how far Super Bear Adventure has come and ensures you are running the latest version with all the newest content. If you are experiencing issues with a specific version, check our troubleshooting guide for solutions.

How to Check Your Current Version

Before diving into the changelogs, here is how to find out which version you are running:

  1. Open Super Bear Adventure on your device.
  2. Go to the Settings menu (gear icon).
  3. Look for the version number, usually displayed at the bottom of the settings screen.
  4. Compare your version number with the latest version listed below.

If you are not on the latest version, update through your device’s app store. If you are using the mod APK, check our download page for the latest mod version. You can also find older mod versions on our archive page.

Latest Version: v12.1.5 (2026)

v12.1.5 - Bug Fixes and Polish (June 2026)

Release Date: June 2026

This maintenance update focuses on stability and bug fixes reported by the community after the major v12.1.0 content update.

Bug Fixes:

  • Fixed a crash that occurred when transitioning between Snow Valley and Beemothep Desert rapidly
  • Resolved an issue where certain collectibles in the Giant House would respawn incorrectly after being collected
  • Fixed multiplayer desync issues that caused player positions to appear incorrect for connected players
  • Corrected a rendering glitch on certain Android devices running Android 15
  • Fixed an issue where some redeem codes were not being processed correctly

Performance Improvements:

  • Reduced memory usage by approximately 15% across all devices
  • Improved loading times for The Hive and Mole Mines worlds
  • Optimized particle effects in Snow Valley to reduce frame drops
  • Better texture streaming on low-end devices

Quality of Life:

  • Added a confirmation dialog when spending large amounts of coins
  • Improved the visibility of collectible indicators on the minimap
  • Minor text corrections in NPC dialogue across multiple regions

v12.1.0 - The Summer Update (May 2026)

Release Date: May 2026

The Summer Update brought significant new content and features to Super Bear Adventure.

New Content:

  • Added new summer-themed cosmetics including beach skins and tropical hats
  • New side quests in Turtletown with unique summer storylines
  • Three new secret areas added across existing worlds
  • New collectible stickers with summer artwork
  • Seasonal event with limited-time challenges

Gameplay Additions:

  • New swimming mechanics with improved underwater exploration
  • Added photo mode with filters and sharing options
  • New environmental hazards in updated world sections
  • Additional medal challenges in existing worlds

Multiplayer Updates:

  • Improved room stability for four-player sessions
  • Added new emotes for player communication
  • Better matchmaking algorithm for Quick Match
  • Reduced connection latency by 20%

Version 12.x Series

v12.0.5 - Stability Update (March 2026)

Release Date: March 2026

Bug Fixes:

  • Fixed a critical bug where save data could be corrupted when the game was force-closed during autosave
  • Resolved multiplayer connection drops on certain network configurations
  • Fixed collision detection issues in Mole Mines tunnels
  • Corrected medal tracking for several world-specific challenges

Improvements:

  • Better controller support for PC users
  • Improved tutorial prompts for new players
  • Enhanced NPC pathfinding in populated areas

v12.0.0 - The Mole Mines Expansion (January 2026)

Release Date: January 2026

The start of the version 12 era brought one of the game’s most anticipated content expansions.

Major Addition: Mole Mines World:

  • Complete new world with underground exploration theme
  • New missions unique to the Mole Mines
  • Underground boss encounters with unique mechanics
  • New mole NPCs with full dialogue trees and side quests
  • Mine cart sequences with physics-based gameplay
  • Hidden underground caverns with rare collectibles

New Features:

  • Achievement system overhaul with new achievement categories
  • Updated map system with better navigation tools
  • New crafting-lite system for special items
  • Expanded inventory management

Character Additions:

  • New character skins themed around mining and underground exploration
  • Miner hat variants with functional headlamp visual effect
  • New NPC characters in the Mole Mines region

Version 11.x Series

v11.5.0 - Holiday Update (December 2025)

Release Date: December 2025

Seasonal Content:

  • Winter holiday event with decorated environments
  • Holiday-themed missions and challenges
  • Special holiday redeem codes released (now expired)
  • Snow effects added to non-snow worlds during the event period
  • Holiday cosmetics including Santa hats and festive skins

Gameplay Updates:

  • Improved boss fight mechanics with better tells for attack patterns
  • New difficulty settings for accessibility
  • Pet companion feature (cosmetic) introduced
  • Updated daily challenge system

v11.3.0 - The Hive Update (October 2025)

Release Date: October 2025

Major Addition: The Hive World:

  • New world featuring honeycomb architecture and bee-themed environments
  • Unique vertical exploration with flight-assisted sections
  • Bee queen boss encounter with multi-phase fight
  • Honey-based mechanics including sliding and sticking surfaces
  • Full walkthrough available in our Hive walkthrough guide

Multiplayer Improvements:

  • Four-player support expanded to the new Hive world
  • New cooperative puzzle elements designed for multiplayer
  • Improved voice chat integration on supported platforms
  • Friend list management updates

Bug Fixes:

  • Fixed over 30 reported bugs from the community
  • Improved stability on iOS 18
  • Resolved save synchronization issues for players using multiple devices

v11.1.0 - Quality of Life Update (August 2025)

Release Date: August 2025

Improvements:

  • Completely redesigned settings menu with better organization
  • New accessibility options including colorblind modes and text size adjustments
  • Improved camera controls with sensitivity slider
  • Better minimap with togglable layers
  • Reduced app size by optimizing asset compression

Content:

  • 15 new stickers added across all existing worlds
  • New NPC interactions in previously sparse areas
  • Additional dialogue for existing characters
  • New environmental details and polish across all worlds

v11.0.0 - The Giant House Update (June 2025)

Release Date: June 2025

Major Addition: Giant House World:

  • Entirely new world with unique oversized environment
  • Scale-based puzzle mechanics
  • Giant household objects as platforming elements
  • New boss encounters themed around the giant house concept
  • Comprehensive coverage in our Giant House walkthrough

Engine Improvements:

  • Upgraded rendering engine for better visual quality
  • Dynamic lighting improvements across all worlds
  • Better shadow rendering on high-end devices
  • Improved water reflections and effects

Version 10.x Series

v10.5.0 - Desert Expansion (March 2025)

Release Date: March 2025

Content Updates:

  • Expanded Beemothep Desert with new sub-regions
  • Ancient tomb exploration with puzzle-heavy gameplay
  • New desert-themed cosmetics and collectibles
  • Expanded lore content with hieroglyphic translations
  • New sand-surfing traversal mechanic

System Updates:

  • Redesigned shop interface
  • Improved coin earning rates for certain activities
  • New daily login reward system
  • Better notification system for events and updates

v10.2.0 - Multiplayer Overhaul (January 2025)

Release Date: January 2025

Multiplayer Rewrite:

  • Complete rewrite of multiplayer networking code
  • Reduced latency by approximately 40% compared to previous versions
  • Support for four simultaneous players (up from two)
  • New room management features for hosts
  • Cross-platform play between Android and iOS
  • Full details in our multiplayer guide

Bug Fixes:

  • Fixed hundreds of community-reported bugs
  • Improved frame rate stability on mid-range devices
  • Resolved memory leak on extended play sessions

v10.0.0 - The Snow Valley Expansion (November 2024)

Release Date: November 2024

Major Addition: Snow Valley World:

  • New winter-themed world with ice physics
  • Avalanche events and dynamic weather
  • Ice skating mechanics on frozen lakes
  • Snow Valley boss encounters
  • Hidden ice caves with rare collectibles
  • Covered in our Snow Valley secrets guide

New Features:

  • Weather system affecting gameplay in all worlds
  • Temperature mechanic in Snow Valley
  • New movement abilities including ice sliding
  • Expanded medal system with new medal types

Version 9.x Series

v9.5.0 - Halloween Event Update (October 2024)

Release Date: October 2024

Seasonal Content:

  • Halloween-themed environmental changes
  • Spooky cosmetics and limited-time challenges
  • Halloween boss rush mode
  • Pumpkin collectible hunt event
  • Special Halloween redeem codes

v9.2.0 - Turtletown Expansion (August 2024)

Release Date: August 2024

Content:

  • Expanded Turtletown with new beach and underwater sections
  • New underwater exploration mechanics
  • Additional Turtletown missions and side quests
  • New turtle NPC characters with expanded dialogue
  • Improved tutorial experience for new players

v9.0.0 - The Customization Update (June 2024)

Release Date: June 2024

Major Feature: Expanded Customization:

  • Massive expansion of the skin and hat system
  • Over 50 new cosmetic items added
  • Color customization for certain skin elements
  • Mix-and-match system for combining skin parts
  • Cosmetic preview before purchase
  • Wishlist feature for cosmetics

Other Updates:

  • Improved coin farming activities
  • New achievements tied to customization milestones
  • Social features for sharing character screenshots

Version 8.x Series

v8.5.0 (April 2024)

Updates:

  • Performance optimization pass across all worlds
  • Improved Android 14 compatibility
  • New control scheme option with customizable button layout
  • Additional languages support
  • Bug fixes for reported crashes

v8.0.0 - The Arcade Update (February 2024)

Major Addition: Arcade World:

  • New hub area with mini-games
  • Multiple arcade games and challenges
  • Leaderboard system for arcade scores
  • Arcade-specific rewards and cosmetics
  • Ticket-based prize system

Version 7.x Series

v7.5.0 (December 2023)

Updates:

  • Holiday event content
  • Performance improvements
  • Controller support improvements
  • Cloud save feature introduced
  • New accessibility options

v7.0.0 - The Sticker Update (October 2023)

Major Feature: Sticker Collection System:

  • Introduction of the collectible sticker system
  • Stickers hidden throughout all existing worlds
  • Sticker album with completion tracking
  • Rewards for sticker collection milestones
  • All locations detailed in our sticker locations guide

Version 6.x Series

v6.5.0 (August 2023)

Updates:

  • Beemothep Desert world introduced as main content addition
  • Egyptian-themed exploration with pyramid structures
  • Desert-specific movement mechanics
  • New boss encounters
  • Puzzle-heavy gameplay design

v6.0.0 (May 2023)

Updates:

  • Medal system introduced
  • Complete medal tracking across all worlds
  • Medal rewards for completion milestones
  • Bronze, Silver, and Gold medal tiers
  • All medal details in our medals guide

Earlier Versions (v1.0 - v5.x)

Version 5.x (2023)

  • Expanded Turtletown with additional areas
  • Improved graphics engine
  • First multiplayer features (two-player support)
  • Basic character customization
  • Quality of life improvements

Version 4.x (2022)

  • New game modes introduced
  • Improved controls and camera system
  • Additional NPC interactions
  • Performance optimizations for older devices
  • Bug fix compilations

Version 3.x (2022)

  • First major content expansion
  • New areas added to the initial world
  • Boss encounter system introduced
  • Coin economy rebalancing
  • Save system improvements

Version 2.x (Early 2022)

  • Major stability improvements
  • New platforming mechanics
  • Additional collectibles
  • Improved visual effects
  • Tutorial system overhaul

Version 1.0 - Initial Release (2021)

  • Original release of Super Bear Adventure
  • Turtletown as the primary world
  • Basic movement and platforming mechanics
  • Core coin collection system
  • Initial set of missions and challenges
  • Foundation of the Baaren story and lore

How Updates Affect the Mod APK

Each time the official game receives an update, the mod APK version needs to be updated as well to match the new content and features. Here is what to know:

  • New content: Mod APK updates typically include all new worlds, missions, and features from the official update.
  • Mod features: The mod menu and features like unlimited money are maintained and updated alongside the game content.
  • Timing: There is usually a brief delay between the official update and the corresponding mod APK release as the mod developers adapt their modifications to the new version.
  • Old versions: Previous mod versions are archived on our old versions page in case you need them for compatibility reasons.

Staying Updated

How to Get Notified About Updates

  • Enable auto-updates in your app store settings to receive official updates automatically
  • Bookmark this page as we update it whenever a new version is released
  • Check our homepage at superbearadventuremod.io for the latest news and updates
  • Follow community channels where update announcements are often shared first

What to Do After Updating

After installing a new update, we recommend:

  1. Check the changelog above to understand what is new
  2. Explore new content areas if any were added
  3. Try any new redeem codes that may have been released with the update
  4. Report any new bugs to the developer community
  5. Visit updated areas to see if new secret areas or easter eggs have been added

This changelog is continuously maintained and updated as new versions are released. Bookmark this page for the most comprehensive Super Bear Adventure version history available online.
